plugins.name: social-archiver
plugins.description: Claude / Codex skills for Social Archiver. Drive the Obsidian plugin (Obsidian CLI or direct vault Markdown) or the desktop app (standalone `sa` CLI, no GUI) to archive social-media posts, post vault notes to the timeline, add comments, poll jobs, manage tags, run subscriptions, import Instagram exports, and run the headless AI executor — without opening modals or relying on UI state. Public content only; respects credit and rate limits.
